overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a snow-covered Japanese village. The character approaches and passes a large traditional castle while navigating through streets lined with wooden buildings and market stalls.

events.description: character stops walking and looks around to observe the castle

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy village street and pausing to observe the castle tower ahead

notable_agents.action: villager wearing a conical hat and straw coat walking alongside the path

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden buildings with snow-covered roofs lining the left side
large multi-tiered Japanese castle tower with white walls and dark roofs
tall stone wall running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a samurai through a snow-covered village street. Traditional wooden houses line the left while a stone wall runs along the right. In the distance, a large castle tower dominates the view. The character briefly stops to look around before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle perimeter with stone walls and gardens

events.description: moving from open village street to the castle side path with the tower now on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the castle walls with the large tower structure on the right side

notable_agents.action: villager in red robe walking ahead on the snowy path toward the castle

entered.detail: mature pine tree with snow-dusted branches in the castle garden area
stone steps leading up to the castle wall entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the castle perimeter, passing the massive tower structure on the right. A large pine tree stands in the garden area ahead, and stone stairs lead up to the castle entrance. The wooden village houses continue on the left while the stone wall dominates the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from castle area to market district

events.description: entering the market area with wooden stalls and yellow banners becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center approaching market stalls and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered near the stone wall on the right

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with fabric awnings beginning to appear along the street
bare deciduous tree with twisted branches against the sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the castle behind, the character enters a more commercial area of the village. Market stalls with yellow banners begin to appear, and the crowd density increases. The stone wall gives way to more wooden buildings and shops as the street narrows slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with merchant stalls and goods

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow market street lined with goods and vendors on both sides

notable_agents.action: villager in straw coat walking toward the camera through the market

entered.detail: market stalls displaying colorful goods and produce under wooden awnings
traditional paper lanterns hanging from the market stall eaves

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a narrow, bustling market street. Wooden buildings and merchant stalls line both sides, with colorful goods displayed under yellow banners. The street is more enclosed with buildings closer together, and villagers in traditional clothing walk through the snow-covered path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snow-covered village that transitions from the imposing scale of a castle perimeter into a bustling commercial district. It begins by following a samurai down a quiet street lined with wooden houses and a stone wall, with a massive castle tower dominating the distant horizon. As the character advances, the camera tracks alongside the castle's perimeter, passing the towering structure and a large pine tree near stone entrance stairs. The scene then shifts as the stone wall recedes, opening into a more crowded area where market stalls with yellow banners begin to emerge. Finally, the path narrows into a dense market street enclosed by wooden shops and colorful merchant displays, with villagers navigating the snowy ground.
